title: Glarks 4Pcs 3"/80mm 90 Degree Positioning Squares, Right Angle Corner Clamps for Woodworking, Picture Frames, Boxes, Cabinets or Drawers, L-Type Right Angle Ruler, Carpenter Tool (3''/80mm)
features: ♛【What You Get】: Set include 4pcs 90 degree positioning squares, which are bright orange color. Their length is 3"/80mm, thickness is 1/2''/13mm. Used for create perfectly square boxes, drawers, cabinets, frames, furniture cabinets, etc.

♛【Durable Material】: These positioning squares are made of high-impact plastic construction that insures optimal durability and lightweight usability. Which makes the positioning squares easy to clamp and strong enough to not flex.

♛【Perfect 90° Corners】: The simple and easy to use square 90 will become your third hand while assembling cabinets, drawers, boxes or any project that requires a 90 degree corner. It can be used on a standard 90, a t-joint, outside 90 degree, all four corners and more.

♛【Easy to Use】: Both the inside and outside edges of these positioning squares tools can serve as exacting measuring guides. Embossed gradation (in inches and millimeters) are molded into the squares to provide convenient measuring guidance.

♛【Application】: Perfect for all the woodworking carpenters out there no matter whether you are making a picture frame or repairing, building a cabinet or repairing a drawer, building a box or welding a square piece. Our clamping squares are just a good helper to get that job done right.
description: Glarks 4Pcs 3" 90 Degree Positioning Squares, Right Angle Corner Clamps for Woodworking, Picture Frames, Boxes, Cabinets or Drawers, L-type Right Angle Ruler, Carpenter Tool ♣【Specifications:】 ▲ Material: High-impact plastic ▲ Size(L x W x H x T) : 80 x 50 x 15 x 13mm ▲ Color: Bright Orange ▲ Quantity: 4pcs ♣【Product Feature:】 ★ High quality plastic material, strong and durable, thicker and wider, used for most woodworking workpieces. ★ Perfect 90° corners, can be used on a standard 90, a t-joint, outside 90 degree, all four corners and more. ★ Embossed gradation (in inches and millimeters) on both the inside and outside edges of each square. Handy interior notch further enhances squaring accuracy. ★ Ideal for making a picture frame, building a cabinet, repairing a drawer, building a box, welding a square piece. ♣【Package Detail:】 3'' Positioning Squares x 4pcs ♣【Quality Assurance:】 If you receive a defective product or have any problems during use, please feel free to contact us, we will provide return and exchange service at any time.
